title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter has introduced Fusion API, a compound model system that combines responses from multiple models and uses a judge model to produce final answers. The creator tested Fusion against claimed Fable-level intelligence but found real-world performance inconsistent, often slower and more expensive than using single strong models directly.
writeup: The video covers OpenRouter's new Fusion API, a compound model system that combines responses from multiple models and routes them through a judge model to generate final answers. It pairs this setup with OpenCode and a set of free models including MiniMax M3, Step 3.7 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM, and Kimi. The creator tested Fusion against its claimed Fable-level intelligence and found real-world performance inconsistent, frequently slower and more expensive than calling single strong models directly. The takeaway: the ensemble approach did not reliably outperform straightforward use of capable individual models.
